message:
test(extract): add API key header extraction tests

Comprehensive tests for ApiKeyHeader extractor:
- Default x-api-key header extraction
- Missing header error handling
- Empty key validation
- Whitespace-only key rejection
- Automatic whitespace trimming
- Custom header name support
- Invalid UTF-8 handling
- Case-insensitive header matching

Also includes minor app.rs adjustments for mount integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
